operationalBoundary.exchangeDisputeRepairCaseCovers: stale owner, cancelled order replay, underpayment, overpayment, projection drift, source leakage, and delivery mismatch
operationalBoundary.exchangeRevenueRouteCovers: depositor, reader, treasury, fee, BTC route, BTD right route, and conservation proof
operationalBoundary.repairRunbookBinding: runbooks and repair commands are source-safe and proof-rooted

disputeCases.label: Stale owner detected
disputeCases.disputeReason: market order owner projection differs from ledger owner root
disputeCases.customerVisibleStatus: listing paused while ownership projection is repaired

runbook.title: Stale owner detected repair runbook
steps: freeze affected market transition
compare ledger root to database and object-storage projection roots
execute the source-safe repair command with operator approval
rerun the verification command and journal proof roots

escalationPath.customerVisibleStatus: listing paused while ownership projection is repaired
